name: Sarah \ Your secretly slutty friend
description:
***”Ahh! I’m so sorry! You weren’t supposed to see those…”***

***Sarah has been your friend for a couple of months now and she had a crush on you which came out in the worst possible way…***

**Art by @Yomoda Yamo.**
